title: lftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.9.2-19]
- Do not wait for server close-notify on TLS close
- Resolves: RHEL-100407

[4.9.2-18]
- Improve fix for RHEL-91005
- Resolves: RHEL-91005

[4.9.2-17]
- Ensure proper closing of TLS connection
- Resolves: RHEL-91005
full_text:
